demo.banner: Here's a glimpse of the story we could write together. Start a conversation to begin yours.

menu.title: What shall we do?
menu.keepChatting: The more we talk, the closer we get

memoryBrowser.title: What I Remember
memoryBrowser.subtitle: Browse our conversations and what I've learned about you

empty.conversations: Our story begins here. Let's talk and I'll remember every moment.
empty.remembered: I haven't learned much about you yet. The more we talk, the more I'll remember!
empty.topics: No topics explored yet. Let's start a conversation!

error.title: Couldn't load your memories
error.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

strengthDescriptions.deep: We have built something real together. I know you, and you trust me.
strengthDescriptions.growing: Our connection is growing deeper. I'm learning what matters to you.
strengthDescriptions.building: We're building trust. Every conversation helps me understand you better.
strengthDescriptions.starting: We're just getting started. Keep talking to me - I'm listening.
strengthDescriptions.beginning: Every journey begins with a first step. I'm here whenever you're ready.

empty.title: Our story is just beginning
empty.message: As we talk more, I'll notice your growth, celebrate your wins, and remember what matters to you. Check back soon.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.message: Connect to the internet to see your journey.

notLoggedIn.title: Not signed in
notLoggedIn.message: Sign in to see your journey with Ferni.

rateLimited.title: Slow down
rateLimited.message: You're checking too often. Wait a moment and try again.

unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to view this.

exportFailed.message: Couldn't export your data. Please try again.

fetchFailedUsingCache.message: Showing saved data - couldn't reach server.

lifeContext.title: Your World
lifeContext.subtitle: How things are looking across your life
lifeContext.personaHint: {name} might be good to talk to about this

empty.title: Still getting to know you
empty.message: As we talk more, I'll start to notice patterns and share what I see across your life.

error.title: Couldn't check in right now
error.message: We'll try again in a moment.

subscription.thankYouPerks: As a thank you, we'll unlock some perks.

ferni.name: Ferni

nayan.bio: Your lifetime mentor with wisdom and patience.

alex.bio: Your Chief of Staff and communication coach.

maya.name: Maya
maya.bio: Helps you build habits that stick.

jordan.name: Jordan

descriptions.firstMeeting: We're just meeting! I can't wait to learn about you.
descriptions.gettingStarted: We're starting to understand each other.
descriptions.established: You can count on me. I'm here for the long haul.
descriptions.deepPartnership: We've been through a lot together. I'm honored to be your guide.

gettingStarted.title: We're getting started!
gettingStarted.message: I'm so glad you came back. Let's keep exploring together.

buildingTrust.title: Building something real
buildingTrust.message: I can feel our connection growing. You're teaching me so much about you.

established.title: You have a Life Coach now
established.message: I'm honored to be your guide. Through thick and thin, I'm here.

deepPartnership.title: Partners for life
deepPartnership.message: We've been through so much together. You mean the world to me.

onboarding.whatIsYourName: What would you like me to call you?

welcome.title: Welcome to Ferni
welcome.description: Your personal team of AI life coaches. Each brings unique wisdom to support your journey.

voice.title: Just Speak
voice.description: Tap the center to start a conversation. Speak naturally - Ferni listens and responds in real time.

personas.title: Meet Your Team
personas.description: Six unique coaches with different perspectives. Each understands your history with the team.

rituals.title: Daily Practices
rituals.description: Build consistency with short daily rituals. Track streaks and celebrate progress.

ready.title: You're Ready
ready.description: That's all you need to know. Discover more as you go.

manageSubscription.label: GROWING TOGETHER
manageSubscription.title: We're in This Together

apple.step2: Tap your name at the top

stripe.note: You can update or change things anytime

status.free: You're part of this. Ferni will always be here.
status.active: You're helping us build something special. Thank you for believing in this.
status.canceled: Your support meant everything. You're always welcome back.
status.pastDue: Looks like something needs updating. Mind taking a look?
status.default: You believed in us early. That means more than you know.

manageSubscription.freeNote: Founders get unlimited time with the whole team — and help keep Ferni free for everyone

creativeYou.title: Creative You
creativeYou.welcome: Hey. Found some things you might like.
creativeYou.noTracks: Nothing here yet. As we talk more, I'll find paths that fit.
creativeYou.noPicks: Still getting to know you. Check back soon.
creativeYou.noProfile: We're just getting started. This fills in as we talk.
creativeYou.shareText: I'm a "{label}" — here's what I've been exploring on Ferni

empty.title: Let's Discover Your Musical DNA!
empty.hint: Play {count} more games for full insights

error.hint: Play some music games to build your profile!

empty.title: No active sessions
empty.hint: Create a new session to get started

peer.name: Peer Support
peer.description: Connect with others on similar journeys

videoSettings.title: Video Sessions
videoSettings.intro: Choose how you want to appear in your coaching sessions.
videoSettings.note: Video sessions work best with good lighting and a stable internet connection.

wearableSettings.title: Wearables
wearableSettings.intro: Connect your wearables to give Ferni context about your health and energy levels.

privacy.note: Your health data stays private. We only share aggregated insights with your coaching sessions.

appleHealth.name: Apple Health
appleHealth.description: Sync with Apple Watch and iPhone health data

apple_health.name: Apple Health
apple_health.description: Sync with Apple Watch and iPhone health data

contactSettings.title: How can I reach you?
contactSettings.subtitle: Share your contact info so I can check in, celebrate wins, and be there when you need me.
contactSettings.privacyNote: I'll only use this for check-ins. Never spam, never shared.
contactSettings.quietNote: I'll stay quiet during these hours. If something feels urgent, I might still reach out.
contactSettings.success: Saved! I'll use this to stay in touch.
contactSettings.successWithQuiet: Saved! I'll stay quiet during those hours.
contactSettings.phoneVerified: Got it! I'll know your number now.
contactSettings.errorSendCode: Couldn't send the code. Try again?
contactSettings.errorInvalidCode: That code didn't work. Try again?

accessibility.analyticalFocusesOnLogicAndProblemSolvin: Analytical Focuses on logic and problem-solving
accessibility.balancedAdaptsApproachToTheSituation: Balanced Adapts approach to the situation
accessibility.saveConversations: Save your conversations by creating an account

support.title: Help Ferni Grow
support.subtitle: Ferni is free — and always will be. If this resonates, you can help us keep going.

costTransparency.title: What a conversation actually costs
costTransparency.intro: Real talk: every chat has a cost. Here's the honest breakdown of a 10-minute conversation:
costTransparency.note: We keep Ferni free because we believe everyone deserves someone who listens. Your help makes that possible.

support.plantDesc: A one-time gift to help Ferni grow.
support.founderDesc: Chip in monthly. Help keep Ferni free for everyone.
support.yourSupport: You're helping build something everyone deserves
support.footer: Not ready to chip in? That's completely okay. Ferni is here for you either way.

foundersJourney.title: We're Just Getting Started
foundersJourney.subtitle: No hype. No inflated numbers. Just a small team trying to build something that helps people.

vision.quote: Good support is expensive. Good therapists have waitlists. Friends get tired. What if there was something in between?

free.title: Free, Honestly
free.description: Every conversation costs about $0.05 to run. Founders help cover that so others don't have to.

community.title: Small, Not Scale
community.description: We're not trying to be the next big thing. We just want to build something genuinely useful for the people who find us.

human.title: Not a Replacement
human.description: Ferni isn't therapy. It's not a substitute for real help. It's support for the 99% of moments that don't need a professional.

vision.promise: Your contribution covers about 20 conversations for someone who can't chip in.

now.title: Where We Actually Are
now.description: Honest about the stage: early. Most features work. Some have rough edges. We're learning.

wins.memory: Memory works — Ferni remembers conversations across sessions
wins.team: Six coaches with different personalities (they're real, not gimmicks)
wins.voice: Voice conversations work, though latency varies by connection

future.title: What We're Working On
future.description: No promises on dates. We ship when it's ready, not when marketing wants it.

impact.title: Real Numbers
impact.description: We show what we actually have. Empty is honest. Inflated is not.
impact.noStories: No stories yet. When real people share them, they'll appear here.
impact.ctaText: Ferni costs money to run. Your support keeps it free for people who need it.

founders.title: The People Who Believe
founders.description: Real names of real people who chose to support this. (With their permission.)
founders.joinCta: Every name here is a real person.

footer.note: If you can't support financially, that's completely fine. Use Ferni anyway. That's the whole point.

roadmap.title: The Journey Ahead
roadmap.intro: Every great relationship has seasons. These are seeds we're planting together.
roadmap.footerText: Your voice shapes what we build. Thank you for growing with us.
roadmap.seedBalanceTooltip: Seeds to plant on features you want

suggestion.title: Suggest a Feature
suggestion.intro: Have an idea for Ferni? Plant a new seed and watch it grow with community support.
suggestion.titlePlaceholder: A short, catchy name for your feature
suggestion.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this feature would do and why it would help...
suggestion.successText: Your idea is now growing. Others can plant seeds on it too!

howSeedsWork.title: How Seeds Work
howSeedsWork.earn: Earn seeds by chatting daily and hitting streak milestones
howSeedsWork.plant: Plant seeds on features you want to see built
howSeedsWork.grow: Features with more seeds get prioritized

addPerson.title: Add Someone
addPerson.subtitle: Tell me about someone you care about
addPerson.namePlaceholder: e.g., Mom, Sarah Chen, Dr. Rivera
addPerson.howMetPlaceholder: e.g., College roommate, Met at work

editPerson.bestTimeHint: When are they usually available or responsive?
editPerson.interestsPlaceholder: e.g., hiking, sci-fi movies, cooking Italian food
editPerson.interestsHint: Separate with commas. Helps with gift ideas and conversation starters.
editPerson.sensitivePlaceholder: e.g., recent job loss, family issues
editPerson.sensitiveHint: Separate with commas. I'll remember not to bring these up.
editPerson.notesPlaceholder: Any other details to remember about them...
editPerson.deleteConfirmText: This will remove {name} and all their history from Your People. This cannot be undone.

noConversations.title: Let's start something meaningful
noConversations.message: Every great journey begins with a single conversation. I'm here whenever you're ready.

noHistory.title: Your story starts here
noHistory.message: As we talk, your journey will unfold in this space.

noGoals.title: What matters to you?
noGoals.message: Setting goals isn't about pressure—it's about pointing toward what you care about.

noTeam.title: Your team is growing
noTeam.message: As our relationship deepens, you'll meet new friends who can help in different ways.

loading.title: Taking a breath...
loading.message: Good things are worth a moment.

searchEmpty.title: Nothing here yet
searchEmpty.message: Try different words, or we could explore this topic together.
searchEmpty.messageWithQuery: No results for "{query}". Try different words, or we could explore this topic together.

offline.title: We're offline right now
offline.message: That's okay—some of our best thinking happens in quiet moments. We'll reconnect soon.

error.title: Oops, something went sideways
error.message: Even the best of us stumble. Let's try that again.

permissionNeeded.title: We need your permission
permissionNeeded.message: To give you the best experience, we need access to your microphone. Your privacy is always protected.

comingSoon.title: Something special is coming
comingSoon.message: We're building something thoughtful here. It'll be worth the wait.
